thread_name: Dark Zone drops are too plentiful / not focused enough
content:
I think the current DZ has too "centralized" area at the bosses, main boss, and the specific heroic nest at the top right of map. 

If its possible to let F2P players farm the golden chip, I would suggest to revamp the distribution of the hostile nest across the map. Level 40 DZ world should have more heroic nest scattered around the map, replacing those normal and hard nests people usually skip on.

About camping issue and timer, maybe its possible to put a damage-applying and marked-for-everyone penalty on the area nearby boss if a player camp too long there? Or nerf the camper to not being able apply any damage for certain periods/until they move far away from the hotspot. 

DZ vendor should also have a chance to refresh lady death and Warlord, maybe less often than the other stock. Well this one is very beneficial for F2P players, not sure if P2P players will favor this idea or not.

thread_name: Dark Zone drops are too plentiful / not focused enough
content: remover the timer in dz so ppl can farm

thread_name: Dark Zone drops are too plentiful / not focused enough
content: The Dark Zone is a place that is high risk high reward. The highest available tier  need to drop here more frequently. Not only that but mods both weapon and gear need to drop here too. Land Marks need to drop the best stuff too not just the Bosses. I highly recommend you remove the wave system from landmarks and just have the bosses and its company static.

content:
i Want more Heroic Landmarks / Bosses, running for 3 minutes to be able to do a Heroic is just insane, even when u just arrived and the boss got cleared.


i also want to choice my Starting points when entering the Dark Zone

Right now, the Dark Zone has no real solution.

thread_name: Dark Zone drops are too plentiful / not focused enough
content:
I'd say it'd be nice to increase T2 drop rates in DZ a bit. As it is now when I go to DZ I often just drop everything other than skill chips because the drops are just useless. This will also give players who don't have groups or gear to run Elites have some chance at farming some T2 exclusive gear sets and weapons.

If purple chips and T2 gear had a chance at say every landmark boss in level 40 DZ that could give more places worth farming for players. Maybe it's even worthwhile to replace many normal, hard to challenging or heroic difficulty? Do you track how often these difficulties are run? It feels like in this game the lower difficulties are just worthless.

I know this is kind of going against "not focused enough", I think it's more about making DZ more worthwhile for things other than just skill chips to me.

thread_name: Dark Zone drops are too plentiful / not focused enough
content: I’d say increase the time allowed in the DZ from 20 to 30, decrease the spawn times by almost 2, increase the items from 9 to 15 and remove blue chips from bosses, high end chests and missions completion (keep them for randoms chests around the map)

thread_name: Dark Zone drops are too plentiful / not focused enough
content:
DZ right now gets quite repetitive with having only 2 locations worth farming, and the couple challenging bosses on the run between them if they've respawned.

Many players now also just spawn in and leave DZ immediately if subway is not active or they aren't in range to get to it in time. That's just killing content there.

thread_name: Dark Zone drops are too plentiful / not focused enough
content: Yes yes yes, blue stuff is useless, t0-t1 purple too but the skill mods. High end skill mods drop is too low. We play it basically just for mods and credits rn. We need more heroic, but I'd also add legendary bosses for T2 pieces
